name: Pork Tenderloin in Tequila
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Garlic (cut into pieces), 2 cloves each
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread mustard evenly over the pork tenderloin.
2. Heat oil and garlic in a 10-inch skillet until hot.
3. Cook pork in oil over medium heat until browned.
4. Remove garlic from the skillet.
5. Stir in remaining ingredients except parsley.
6. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat.
7. Cover and simmer until pork is cooked through, about 30 minutes.
8. Remove bay leaf and sprinkle with parsley before serving.
